name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Blocks 99% of UVA and UVB rays to protect your eyes.

name: SPF 50+ Sunscreen Lotion
description: Lightweight, non-greasy SPF 50+ sunscreen that protects your skin from harmful UV rays. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes.

name: Cooling Towel
description: Instant cooling towel made from hyper-evaporative material. Simply wet, wring, and snap to activate cooling. Perfect for outdoor activities.

name: Portable Mini Fan
description: USB rechargeable portable mini fan with 3-speed settings. Compact and quiet — ideal for office, travel, and outdoor use.

name: Insulated Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours. BPA-free and leak-proof.

name: Wide Brim Sun Hat
description: Foldable wide-brim sun hat with UPF 50+ protection. Adjustable chin strap keeps it secure on windy days. Perfect for beach, hiking, and gardening.
